docs: Initializes governance with an explicit `maintainer`, references to the treasury, vault,
auction, and oracle contracts, and default params. The maintainer is passed in (typically
the subnet owner) rather than defaulting to the deployer.
The election contract is **instantiated here** from `election_code_hash` and retained;
it is authorized to install maintainers (`elect_maintainer`) and apply netuid switches
(`election_set_netuid`). The initial maintainer is also seated as the election's initial
incumbent. The election derives its genesis cadence anchor from the deployment block
timestamp and its candidate stake bar from its own constant. The council starts empty and
must be seated by the maintainer via [`set_council`].
The vault/auction/oracle addresses are wired so governance can forward privileged calls
to them once it holds their `governance` role (see [`external_calls`]).
constructors.label: new

docs: Emitted when the winning bid tokens are transferred out by the controller.

docs: Emitted when a bid is placed or raised on an auction.

docs: Emitted when the admin account (allowed to bid on expired no-bid auctions) is updated.

docs: Emitted when a new liquidation auction is created.

docs: Emitted when a losing bidder withdraws their refund.

docs: The cycle that was finalized.

docs: The winning candidate's total approval weight.

docs: Total voting power that participated in the cycle.

events.label: ApprovalCast

docs: The subnet now governing.

docs: Emitted on token movement; `from = None` denotes a mint, `to = None` denotes a burn.

docs: Voting power added to the tally: `sqrt(SN113 alpha) * time-staked multiplier`.

docs: Emitted after a scheduled parameter update is executed and becomes active.

docs: Returns the maintainer account.
messages.label: maintainer

docs: Returns the governing subnet netuid (bound to the maintainer; set only by the election).
messages.label: netuid

docs: Returns the election contract address (instantiated at construction).
messages.label: election

docs: Returns the current council members (empty until the maintainer seats them).
messages.label: council

docs: Reports whether `who` is currently a council member.
messages.label: is_council

docs: Returns the treasury contract address.
messages.label: treasury

docs: Installs `new_maintainer` as the maintainer; callable only by the election contract.
The explicit selector is matched by the election's raw cross-contract call.
messages.label: elect_maintainer

docs: Sets the governing subnet `netuid`; callable only by the election contract (used when a
cross-subnet election transition completes). The explicit selector is matched by the
election's raw cross-contract call.
messages.label: election_set_netuid

docs: Replaces the entire council with `members`; maintainer-only. Requires exactly
[`COUNCIL_SIZE`] distinct members, otherwise returns [`Error::InvalidCouncil`].
messages.label: set_council

docs: Schedules a vault contract-parameter update (behind the vault's timelock); maintainer-only.
messages.label: vault_set_contract_params

docs: Cancels the vault's currently scheduled contract-parameter update; maintainer-only.
messages.label: vault_cancel_contract_params_update

docs: Updates the vault's treasury (fee recipient) account; maintainer-only.
messages.label: vault_update_treasury

docs: Updates the vault's platform (pause operator) account; maintainer-only.
messages.label: vault_update_platform

docs: Unpauses the vault; maintainer-only (deliberate recovery).
messages.label: vault_unpause

docs: Pauses the vault; council-only (operational/emergency halt).
messages.label: vault_pause

docs: Sets/clears the oracle's round-committing validator; maintainer-only.
messages.label: oracle_set_validator

docs: Updates the oracle's max allowed price deviation; maintainer-only.
messages.label: oracle_set_max_price_deviation

docs: Commits an emergency oracle price, bypassing quorum/deviation checks; maintainer-only
messages.label: oracle_commit_round

docs: Updates the governing subnet netuid for the oracle; maintainer-only.
messages.label: oracle_set_netuid

docs: Updates the minimum submitter stake threshold for the oracle; maintainer-only.
messages.label: oracle_set_min_submitter_stake

docs: Sets/clears the auction admin (allowed to bid on expired no-bid auctions); maintainer-only.
messages.label: auction_set_admin

docs: Returns the current governance parameters.
messages.label: params

docs: Returns the latest committed snapshot epoch (0 if none submitted yet).
messages.label: current_epoch

docs: Looks up a snapshot by epoch.
messages.label: get_snapshot

docs: Returns the latest committed snapshot packaged for the election contract as
`(root, circulating_supply, netuid, snapshot_block)`, or `None` if none committed yet.
The explicit selector is matched by the election's raw cross-contract call.
messages.label: election_snapshot

docs: Commits a new off-chain snapshot and returns its epoch; council-only (operational duty).
`root` is the Merkle root over `(coldkey, hotkey, balance, multiplier_bps)` leaves (see
[`Snapshot`]); `circulating_supply` is the alpha supply that the quorum is derived from;
`snapshot_block` records the subnet height for off-chain auditing. Each call advances the
epoch by one; proposals submitted afterward bind to the new epoch.
messages.label: submit_snapshot

docs: Returns the absolute quorum threshold for `epoch`: `circulating_supply * quorum_bps /
10_000`. A proposal must gather at least this much raw voted balance (see
[`Proposal::voted_balance`]) to be eligible to pass. Returns 0 if the epoch has no
snapshot.
messages.label: quorum

docs: Returns the total number of proposals submitted.
messages.label: proposal_count

docs: Looks up a proposal by id.
messages.label: get_proposal

docs: Reports whether `(coldkey, hotkey)` has already voted on `proposal_id`.
messages.label: has_voted

docs: Updates the governance parameters; maintainer-only.
messages.label: update_params

docs: Submits a new proposal. Only council members may submit. Proposals are
accepted during the configured day-of-month window (UTC, inclusive).
messages.label: submit_proposal

docs: Casts a vote on `proposal_id`. The caller is the coldkey; `hotkey`, `balance`, and
`multiplier_bps` are the caller's leaf in the proposal's snapshot, proven by `proof`.
Voting power is `sqrt(balance) * multiplier_bps / 10_000`, where `balance` is the
snapshot-frozen SN113 alpha and `multiplier_bps` is the time-staked multiplier.
messages.label: vote

docs: Closes voting and decides the outcome. Permissionless; only callable after `voting_ends_at`.
messages.label: finalize

docs: Executes a passed proposal. For Funding, calls `treasury.release(...)`. Permissionless.
messages.label: execute
